item.title: NASCAR descends on Daytona eager to move on from turbulent offseason, get back to racing
item.description: It was a heartbreaking offseason for much of NASCAR, and as the garage descends on Daytona, the stock car world is ready to refocus on racing.

item.title: Super Bowl runner-up rings: What NFL players really think
item.description: Some conference championship rings fetch big bucks. Others wind up collecting dust on a closet shelf. Players share mixed opinions on the NFL's sparkl...

item.title: What Klint Kubiak hire means for Las Vegas: two-RB system, more 12-personnel and a potential Mendoza pairing
item.description: The Raiders hired Klint Kubiak. Here's what that means for Las Vegas, plus what's next in the offseason.

item.title: Drake Maye lost his first Super Bowl. His future -- and the Patriots' -- remains bright
item.description: Drake Maye and the Patriots weren't able to do much in Super Bowl LX, but their future might still be bright.

item.title: 10 teams, 12 quarterbacks, no great options: Sorting the lackluster NFL quarterback market
item.description: There are no surefire free agent QBs available this March, and the draft class has only one first-round lock. So what now for teams that might need a ...
